findings.summary: Graph conflict penalties raise uncertainty after threshold pass/fail has already been frozen, so conflicting skills can remain marked as passing.
findings.recommended_fix: Recompute passes_threshold after the conflict penalty or derive pass/fail only after all recommendation mutators have completed.

findings.summary: Continuity retrieval tuning is reachable only through the internal adaptiveFusionIntent path while the public classifier cannot emit continuity.
findings.recommended_fix: Either expose continuity as a first-class public intent where appropriate or add end-to-end guarantees and tests that the correct callers always inject adaptiveFusionIntent='continuity'.

findings.summary: The live hybrid search path bypasses adaptiveFuse(), omits document-type calibration, and ignores intent-specific recencyWeight.
findings.recommended_fix: Align the live hybrid path with the adaptive-fusion contract by routing through adaptiveFuse() or reproducing its document-type and recency behavior exactly.

findings.summary: Stage 2 graph calibration only directly calibrates aggregate graphSignalDelta and communityDelta while totalDelta still includes untouched causal/co-activation contributions.
findings.recommended_fix: Expose per-signal graph attribution on PipelineRow and cap each graph sub-signal before recomputing totalDelta.

findings.summary: The Phase 023 implementation summary documents obsolete OpenCode hook lifecycle names that do not match the tested plugin contract.
findings.recommended_fix: Refresh the implementation summary and any copied operator guidance to use the tested OpenCode hook keys.

findings.summary: Reranking now skips 2-3 row result sets, so small-list fusion errors survive, and the retired length penalty no longer offers any compensating bias.
findings.recommended_fix: Add targeted small-result-set regressions and consider intent-specific exceptions if correctness failures concentrate in the 2-3 row regime.

findings.summary: Smart-router telemetry and measurement are still observe-only, and static measurement writes unknown_unparsed records rather than proving live resource compliance.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep static prediction reporting separate from live compliance reporting and expand adapter wiring before drawing stronger correctness conclusions from telemetry.
